name: Swing365Golf
address: 8850 University Ave Suite 102, West Des Moines, IA 50266
about: Swing365Golf West Des Moines is a membership-based golf simulator venue providing access to private, state-of-the-art facilities. The venue operates on a 24/7 schedule with tee times bookable online in individual suites. Each session is typically 60 minutes, though drop-in time is limited. The experience is designed to be convenient and private, with members able to access the simulators anytime. Pricing is structured per hour, with rates around $45 for drop-ins, and a limited number of memberships are available for purchase.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing™ simulator technology with precise, real-time ball tracking
24/7 access to private bays for maximum convenience and flexibility
BYOB policy allows for a customized and relaxed atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Bring your own Food & Beverages (BYOB) is allowed
Bring your own Beverages (BYOB) is allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses infrared technology with 688 sensors to measure ball flight at the speed of light

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing members to bring their own food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 60-minute session is available for booking, which is sufficient time for a round of golf on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information indicating the venue is designed for or welcomes children, so it is likely more focused on adult golfers.
